━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• 'uh', 'um', 'maybe'

8 (confident)"] C5["5. KEYWORD MATCH (15%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

• Must-have (×3 weight)

0 (no keywords)
10 (comprehensive)"] C6["6. RELEVANCE (10%)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Jaccard similarity:
• Question tokens
• Answer tokens
• Common / Union
